Class NewPlayers

java.lang.Object
com.djrapitops.plan.delivery.rendering.json.datapoint.types.NewPlayers
All Implemented Interfaces:

@Singleton public class NewPlayers extends Object implements Datapoint<Integer>
Datapoint for new player count.
